name: conexus
description: Three-tier semantic memory + knowledge management for Claude Desktop chat. Persistent code/docs/RDR indexing, plan-centric retrieval via nx_answer, and a daemon-mediated storage substrate that interoperates with the Claude Code plugin and the nx CLI on the same host.
long_description: Conexus is the Claude Desktop Extension form of Nexus. Same MCP tools and storage tiers as the Claude Code plugin and the nx CLI, packaged as a .mcpb bundle that uv resolves on first install. On first launch, the host's T2 daemon is auto-installed (LaunchAgent on macOS, systemd user unit on Linux) so the MCP server has a daemon to talk to. State is shared with any other consumer on the same host (Claude Code plugin, nx CLI, Cowork via SDK bridge).

tools.name: search
tools.description: Semantic + keyword search across T3 knowledge collections. Returns chunks with metadata, supports topic/cluster grouping and metadata filtering.

tools.name: query
tools.description: Document-level semantic search for analytical questions. Groups results by source document and returns the best-matching snippet per document with full metadata.

tools.name: store_put
tools.description: Store content in the T3 permanent knowledge store.

tools.name: store_get
tools.description: Retrieve the full content of a T3 knowledge entry by document ID or title.

tools.name: store_get_many
tools.description: Batch-hydrate document content by ID. Supports per-id and per-stream collection routing.

tools.name: store_list
tools.description: List entries in a T3 knowledge collection, paged.

tools.name: memory_put
tools.description: Store a memory entry in T2 (per-project SQLite). Upserts by (project, title).

tools.name: memory_get
tools.description: Retrieve a memory entry by project and title, or list all entries for a project.

tools.name: memory_delete
tools.description: Delete a T2 memory entry by project and title.

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Full-text (FTS5) search across T2 memory entries.

tools.name: memory_consolidate
tools.description: Memory consolidation: find overlaps, merge entries, flag stale entries.

tools.name: scratch
tools.description: T1 session scratch pad. Ephemeral within-session storage shared across sibling agents.

tools.name: scratch_manage
tools.description: Manage scratch entries: flag for persistence or promote to T2 memory.

tools.name: collection_list
tools.description: List all T3 collections with document counts and embedding models.

tools.name: plan_save
tools.description: Save a query execution plan to the T2 plan library for reuse.

tools.name: plan_search
tools.description: Search the T2 plan library for similar query plans.

tools.name: operator_extract
tools.description: Extract structured fields from each input item via claude -p.

tools.name: operator_rank
tools.description: Rank items by a natural-language criterion.

tools.name: operator_compare
tools.description: Compare items and return a structured comparison. Supports one-sided and two-sided modes.

tools.name: operator_summarize
tools.description: Summarize content, optionally with citations.

tools.name: operator_generate
tools.description: Generate output from a template and context, optionally with citations.

tools.name: operator_filter
tools.description: Filter items by a natural-language criterion, returning a subset with per-item rationale.

tools.name: operator_check
tools.description: Check a claim's consistency across peer items. Returns structured {ok, evidence} payload.

tools.name: operator_verify
tools.description: Verify a single claim against a single evidence source. Returns {verified, reason, citations}.

tools.name: operator_groupby
tools.description: Partition items by a natural-language key. Pairs with operator_aggregate.

tools.name: operator_aggregate
tools.description: Reduce each group of items to a per-group summary. Pairs with operator_groupby.

tools.name: traverse
tools.description: Walk the catalog link graph from seed tumblers. Supports explicit link_types or named purpose aliases.

tools.name: nx_answer
tools.description: Answer a knowledge question using plan-match-first retrieval. Multi-step composition of search/query/operator tools under a plan-match gate.

tools.name: nx_tidy
tools.description: Consolidate knowledge entries on a topic. Identifies duplicates and contradictions, returns a consolidated summary.

tools.name: nx_enrich_beads
tools.description: Enrich a bead with execution context (file paths, code patterns, constraints, test commands).

tools.name: nx_plan_audit
tools.description: Audit a plan for correctness and codebase alignment before implementation begins.
